flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Westfield State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.5k vs 4.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Westfield State University fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (60.6% → 54.4%).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Westfield State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
